claim_blocked_reason: accepted failures or failed controls remain in V61 discovery ledger

controls.reason: All targets are RCSB experimental protein entities.
Each target is a unique 30% sequence-cluster representative.
All targets satisfy the requested length filter.
Engine source last commit is the requested E60 starting commit.
Operator and mechanism sets are frozen.
Every packet is sealed before holdout.
Every holdout references the sealed prediction hash.
Forced wrong grammars are rejected or routed to abstention.
Composition-preserving shuffled controls are generated with target metadata withheld; stronger shuffled coherence cases are reported rather than used as validation support.
Holdout validation cannot initialize prediction before sealing.
Internal runtime cannot become biological evidence.
Every target has an explicit score row.
README is manual-owned and must remain untouched.

forbidden_claims: Coordinates or contacts were predicted de novo.
Engine changes were made during V61.
Failures may be hidden or repaired after holdout.
